industries.label: Nuclear Industry
industries.description: Maps the listed nuclear-power ecosystem rather than pretending there are many pure-play nuclear stocks. The shortlist focuses on utilities, EPC, heavy engineering, and civil-infra names tied to nuclear buildout.

candidates.fit: Large EPC and heavy-engineering player with exposure to complex industrial and power infrastructure projects.
Heavy power-equipment manufacturer that can benefit from large domestic power-capex cycles.
Large utility platform with balance-sheet scale and optionality around future nuclear-generation buildout.
Civil-infrastructure contractor relevant to large and technically demanding project execution.
Transmission and power-infrastructure angle that can support broader grid buildout around generation projects.

industries.label: Defence Industry
industries.description: Focuses on India-listed defence and aerospace leaders across electronics, platforms, missiles, and manufacturing support.

candidates.fit: Core defence-electronics and systems leader.
Aircraft and aerospace platform exposure.
Missile systems and strategic-defence exposure.
Ammunition and defence manufacturing optionality.
Naval and shipbuilding exposure.

industries.label: Solar Industry
industries.description: Maps solar and renewable candidates across utilities, EPC, module manufacturing, and green-power developers.

candidates.fit: Integrated utility with renewable and solar execution exposure.
Large listed renewable developer.
Utility with renewable scale and capex optionality.
Listed renewable developer with solar concentration.
Broader clean-energy equipment angle.

industries.label: Banking Industry
industries.description: Maps major listed banking candidates across private lenders and PSU banks.

candidates.fit: Private-bank leader with broad retail and corporate franchise.
Large private lender with strong profitability profile.
Large PSU banking exposure and system-level franchise.
Conservative franchise with long-term quality appeal.
Large private bank with improving operating profile.

industries.label: Pharma Industry
industries.description: Maps listed pharma leaders across generics, APIs, formulations, and specialty exposure.

candidates.fit: Large pharma leader with broad product mix.
API and manufacturing-quality exposure.
Generics and global pharma franchise.
Formulations and respiratory franchise strength.
Generics and specialty optionality.
